mapper.select: SELECT er.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, COUNT(*) AS recordCount, SUM(er.amount) AS unsettledAmount FROM u_earnings_record er JOIN u_user u ON u.id = er.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE er.status = 0 AND er.settlement_month = #{month} AND er.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY er.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY unsettledAmount DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.user_id) FROM u_earnings_record er WHERE er.status = 0 AND er.settlement_month = #{month} AND er.is_deleted = 0

SELECT er.user_id AS userId, COUNT(*) AS recordCount, SUM(er.amount) AS unsettledAmount FROM u_earnings_record er WHERE er.status = 0 AND er.settlement_month = #{month} AND er.is_deleted = 0
AND er.user_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY er.user_id
